zh.action.formatConvert.label: 格式转换

en.config.ffmpegPath.tooltip: FFmpeg executable path. Leave empty to use system PATH.
en.action.formatConvert.label: Format Convert
en.action.formatConvert.description: Convert audio/video formats. Supports common format conversions.
en.action.merge.label: Merge Audio & Video
en.action.merge.description: Merge separate audio and video files into one.
en.action.demux.label: Demux Audio/Video
en.action.demux.description: Extract audio track from video or remove audio track.

en.field.inputPath.tooltip: Absolute path of the input file.

en.field.ffmpegPath.tooltip: Leave empty to use system PATH.

en.field.outputPathRequired.tooltip: Output path for the merged file.

en.field.shortest.tooltip: When audio/video lengths differ, truncate to the shorter one.
